blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,074 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
